extension.summary: Stream All The Sources - 45+ scrapers, Stremio, Trakt, Debrid
extension.description:
SALTS is a multi-source video addon with 45+ scrapers including Stremio protocol (Torrentio, MediaFusion, Comet, CyberFlix, PeerFlix).
Features: - Stremio Scrapers: Torrentio, MediaFusion, Comet, CyberFlix (free), Annatar, PeerFlix (free), EasyNews+ - Torrent Sites: 1337x, YTS, EZTV, TorrentGalaxy, TPB, NNM-Club, RuTracker, RuTor, Nyaa, etc. - Free Streams: VidSrc, 2Embed, AutoEmbed, CyberFlix, PeerFlix (no debrid needed) - Jackett/Prowlarr Integration: Connect to any indexer - Debrid Services: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox - Trakt.tv: Scrobbling, mark watched, watchlists, collections, history with TMDB posters - ResolveURL for 270+ hosting sites
Revived and modernized by zeus768 for Kodi 21 Omega and above. Original author: tknorris Thank you to Mister X and Zaxxon709
extension.news:
v2.6.0 (2026) - Added: Torrentio scraper (Stremio protocol) - 20+ torrent indexers aggregated - Added: MediaFusion scraper (Stremio protocol) - community torrent/stream aggregator - Added: Comet scraper (Stremio protocol) - fast torrent aggregator - Added: CyberFlix scraper (Stremio, FREE) - direct streams, no debrid required - Added: Annatar scraper (Stremio protocol) - Jackett/Prowlarr via Stremio - Added: PeerFlix scraper (Stremio, FREE) - P2P streams, no debrid required - Added: EasyNews+ scraper (Stremio protocol) - Usenet streams - Fixed: Trakt scrobbling now fires during playback (start at 2%, stop on finish) - Fixed: Trakt mark watched - items marked after 80% playback completion - Fixed: Trakt lists now show TMDB posters, fanart, ratings, and watched overlay - Fixed: Trakt stale ADDON instance bug - fresh xbmcaddon.Addon() for all settings reads/writes - Fixed: Watched tick indicator ([W]) on Trakt list items with playcount overlay
v2.5.3 (2026) - User's custom fixes and improvements
v2.1.8 (2026) - Fixed: Source dialog rendering - moved to inline native Kodi Dialog().select() with color-coded formatting - Fixed: Eliminated external module dependency for source dialog (no more import failures) - Added: Quality color badges inline (gold 4K, green 1080p, blue 720p, purple 480p, gray SD) - Added: CACHED/FREE tags, seed health coloring, file sizes all in native dialog
v2.1.7 (2026) - Added: Bento UI Source Dialog - custom skin with quality-colored badges, cached/free tags, seeds, size - Added: Pre-Scrape hover caching - background scrape after 2s hover on movie items (4-link rule) - Added: 24hr TTL hover cache in SQLite for instant source availability
